productDisplayName: SDL by Sweet Dreams Men Grey & Black Pyjama Set
description: Style Note Perfect to slip into on a lazy day, to wear for a morning jog or just for after-hours at home, these pyjama sets from Sweet Dreams Loungewear instantly transport you to a world of calm. Crafted from soft cotton in suave and sporty styles, they offer exemplary comfort and a flattering Fit. Product Details Light grey polo neck T-shirt, with grey tipped, ribbed black collar, two-buttoned chest placket, short sleeves, vented hems and embroidered brand logo on the left chest, contrast panel across the chest Black bermuda shorts, elasticated waist with drawstrings, pockets on the sides and contrast panel on the sides Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach, dry clean or iron on decoration or print Tumble dry, normal, low heat Iron low and dry in shade Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing size M
